Verdict PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with a single non-blocking P3 (descriptor_ref id-precedence) and no P0/P1/P2; this review is one input to the C05 gate and is not final approval.","findings":[{"id":"CP00-181-P3-001","severity":"P3","title":"descriptor_ref precedence resolves to matter_id for all non-Matter model types, making the other id branches unreachable and descriptor_ref non-unique per entity","file":"packages/matter/src/service.js","line":238,"details":"descriptorRefFor (service.js:235-249) builds primaryId via the null-coalescing chain descriptor.matter_id ?? member_id ?? task_id ?? section_id ?? edge_id ?? node_id ?? wiki_id. Because matter_id is a required field on every non-Matter Matter Core type (member, task, section, edge, node, wiki), descriptor.matter_id is always populated and short-circuits the chain, so the subsequent branches are dead code. The resulting descriptor_ref is `${model_type}:${matter_id}` rather than `${model_type}:${entity_own_id}`, so two entities of the same model_type under the same matter (e.g. two MatterMember rows) collide on an identical descriptor_ref instead of being distinguished by their own primary id. This is benign in the current pack because descriptor_only:true and runtime_dispatch_enabled:false (service.js:371-372): descriptor_ref is a never-write reference/display hint and is not used for any persistence, lookup, permission, audit, or dispatch path, and the serialized API result omits the descriptor body. No correctness, security, or no-write-boundary impact under the current descriptor-only architecture.","recommendation":"Before any future pack enables runtime dispatch or uses descriptor_ref for entity identity/lookup, reorder the precedence so each model_type resolves to its own primary id (e.g. select by model_type, or place the entity-specific id ahead of matter_id), or remove the unreachable branches to make the matter-scoped intent explicit. No change required for CP00-181 closeout.","post_review_disposition":"open_non_blocking"}],"finding_counts":{"p0":0,"p1":0,"p2":0,"p3":1,"reported_p0":0,"reported_p1":0,"reported_p2":0,"reported_p3":1}},"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"e5b3deed-5afd-4678-8257-82be316e562b"}
